name: Spiced Chocolate Fondue
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Coffee flavored liqueur (30mL) or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chocolate chips and corn syrup in a microwave-safe measuring cup.
2. Microwave uncovered on 50% power until the mixture can be stirred smooth, about 1 1/2 - 2 minutes.
3. Stir in milk, liqueur, and cinnamon.
4. Microwave uncovered on medium power, stirring every minute, for 2 - 3 minutes until warm.
5. Pour into a fondue pot or chafing dish to keep warm. If the mixture becomes too thick, stir in a small amount of milk.
